hero.subtitle: An association bringing light, joy, and happiness to the sick and elderly in medical centers and through home visits.

about.title: Who Are We?
about.description: Lev Chedva was established with the aim of spreading light and joy among those who need it most. We believe that a single smile can change the world.
about.mission: Our mission is to be there for every person who feels lonely or in pain, and to bring them the spirit of heart and joy.

donation.title: Join Our Mission
donation.subtitle: Your every contribution helps us reach more hearts and create more moments of happiness.

contact.title: Talk to Us
contact.description: We will accompany you at any time, with advice, guidance, or just a listening ear. Our team is here for any question or help you may need.
contact.name: Full Name
contact.address_value:
Office: Levona St 1 Jerusalem
Equipment Center: Moshe Yustman St 2 Jerusalem
contact.volunteer_title: Looking for how to volunteer or donate?
contact.volunteer_desc: Join the Lev Chedva family and take part in our blessed work for the sick and elderly.

footer.description: A registered association in Israel working to improve the mental well-being of the sick and elderly.
